error_signature: Cannot write to specified file path
title: File write error in Docker environment
symptom: The workflow fails to download and save the video file, likely due to path issues in a Docker container.
applies_when: Running n8n in a Docker container
Trying to write to a Windows file path
not_this_if: Running n8n directly on Windows without Docker
root_cause: When n8n is run inside a Docker container, it does not have access to the Windows file system unless properly configured. The default security settings may also restrict file access to certain directories.
fix_steps: Change the file path in the Read/Write Files node to just 'test_video.mp4'
If using Docker, ensure to map a volume to your Windows folder and use Linux paths for file access.
agent_instruction: Modify the file path to 'test_video.mp4' and check your Docker volume mappings.
